_publications._publicationTitle: Using Durometers to Quantify Stiffness as an Outcome Measure for Cutaneous Neurofibroma in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: this number was large enough to yield agreement measure (ICCs and Lin's CCC) estimates with good precision (margin of error, 95% CI half width). The precision of ICC estimates was 0.061–0.090 for DEFLIN and 0.020–0.167 for REX
details: Used for statistical analysis including linear mixed-effects models, ICC calculations, and Lin's concordance correlation coefficients with good precision (margin of error 95% CI half width 0.061-0.090 for DELFIN, 0.020-0.167 for REX)
